name: sd3_train_ref
purpose: Serenity SD3/SD3.5 cached-data train parity dump contract for predict -> loss -> backward_lora_or_finetune -> optimizer gates.

numeric_parity_policy.cpu_pytorch_dry_runs: structural/config/cache/source checks only; never numeric parity
numeric_parity_policy.full_finetune_scope: In scope when Serenity registers the SD3/SD3.5 fine-tune loader, setup, and data-loader paths; adapter safetensors remain LoRA-only, and full-weight save/load/resume parity is a separate gate.

training_method_scope.LORA: in scope when Serenity registers loader/setup/data-loader paths
training_method_scope.FINE_TUNE: in scope when Serenity registers loader/setup/data-loader paths
training_method_scope.EMBEDDING: not in scope for this SD3 train-reference scaffold
training_method_scope.FINE_TUNE_VAE: not in scope for this SD3 train-reference scaffold

step_safetensors_keys.cached_batch: batch.* tensors exactly as Serenity data_loader yields them, including latent_image, tokens_1/2/3, tokens_mask_1/2/3, cached text_encoder hidden/pooled states when present, loss_weight, concept_type, and optional latent_mask or latent_conditioning_image.
step_safetensors_keys.trace: trace.* tensors captured from Serenity BaseStableDiffusion3Setup.predict, StableDiffusion3Model.encode_text, StableDiffusion3Model.combine_text_encoder_output, and SD3Transformer2DModel.forward. Expected keys include per-encoder cached/text outputs, combined_text_encoder_output, combined_pooled_text_encoder_output, scaled_latent_image, latent_noise, scaled_noisy_latent_image, sigma, latent_input, transformer_timestep, encoder_hidden_states, pooled_projections, predicted_flow, and flow.
step_safetensors_keys.outputs: output.timestep, output.predicted, output.target, optional output.prior_target, output.loss_pre_scale, and output.loss_for_backward.

adapter_safetensors_keys.scope: LoRA-only. Fine-tune runs must not serialize full model weights under adapter keys.
adapter_safetensors_keys.initial: adapter_initial.* trainable SD3 LoRA tensors when --adapter-dump initial is used.
adapter_safetensors_keys.step: adapter_before.*, adapter_pre.*, adapter_post.*, and adapter_after.* trainable SD3 LoRA tensors when named trainable params are exposed.
adapter_safetensors_keys.step-with-grads: adapter_before.*, adapter_pre.*, adapter_pre_clip.*, adapter_pre_clip_grad.*, adapter_post.*, adapter_post_clip.*, adapter_post_clip_grad.*, and adapter_after.* trainable SD3 LoRA tensors/gradients.

required_reports: base/vae/lora model names and text encoder include flags
cache directory, image cache status, and text cache status
single-file or diffusers-dir local model status
Serenity registration status for LORA and FINE_TUNE
structured_blockers with stable id, category, message, and details
current_known_blockers_for_default_confi: No Serenity data loader registered for STABLE_DIFFUSION_3.
Required latent/text cache is missing or empty (image files=0, text files=0).

Single-file checkpoint has no inspectable CLIP/T5 text encoder keys; use a full local diffusers snapshot or an existing text cache before producing a CUDA numeric reference. Dry-run remains structural only and is not numeric parity evidence.

bounded_run_notes: The script is single-process only and enforces --max-steps 1.
Non-dry-run refuses CPU train_device because CPU PyTorch is not numeric parity evidence.
By default it requires existing image/text caches and does not rebuild them. Pass --allow-cache-build only when local text encoder weights are present.
Full fine-tune is in scope when Serenity registers the selected SD3 model loader, setup, and data loader; adapter tensor dumps are skipped for non-LoRA methods.
It imports Serenity from /home/alex/Serenity and chdirs there before importing modules.util.create because Serenity factory.import_dir uses cwd-relative paths.
It preserves tensor storage dtype in safetensors dumps; scalar stats in JSON are computed in float32 where needed.
It refuses to silently produce a zero-text-conditioning numeric reference when both text cache and local text encoder weights/full snapshot are absent.
It does not call GenericTrainer.end(), so it does not perform Serenity final model saves.
It does not edit Serenity source, SD3 LoRA files, SD3 sampler files, or Mojo runtime files.
